Moraea knersvlaktensis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, commonly known as the iris family. This plant is a member of the genus Moraea, which includes several species of irises native to southern Africa. Moraea knersvlaktensis is further classified as a species within the subgenus Moraea, which is characterized by its distinctive flower shape and color. The classification of Moraea knersvlaktensis is based on its unique morphological features and genetic characteristics. As a result, it is recognized as a distinct species by botanists and taxonomists.
